name: Research Lab Notebook
description: Lab-style grid paper with clean metadata emphasis for experiments and observations.

preview.sampleText: Structured entries for hypothesis, observations, and conclusions.

classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-600 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.th: border border-slate-300 p-2 bg-slate-100 text-left font-semibold text-slate-900
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-teal-500 pl-4 my-4 italic text-slate-700 bg-teal-50 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-slate-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-slate-800
classes.pre: bg-slate-100 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-slate-300
